mentions.note: Manufacturer of power generation for residential, commercial, industrial; transitioned B2C to B2B; AI data center power demand driving 72% YTD gain; Encon acquisition bolsters manufacturing; 500M share buyback announced; going to the stars.
Sixth-best performer (+34%); fast-growing industrial-scale backup power for data centers plus home solar/battery; severe winter weather boosted consumer demand; strong 2026 outlook.
Core backup generator business solid; data-center power growth story compelling; adds amazing high-growth vertical to portfolio.

Data center backlog surged 75% to $700M in 6 weeks; generational opportunity in backup power for hyperscalers; expanding capacity +$1B+ by year-end; inbound demand from enterprise, not outbound sales needed.

Residential backup (grid/weather driven) stable; commercial (hyperscaler data center backup) booming—clients ordering, not pitching. But stock down $7 post-investor day on no hyperscaler contract announcement. Macro morass fears capital drying up or Caterpillar competition; 50 pts off highs despite better story. Wait for clarity.
Backup power supply for data centers in short supply. Market wants shortages; Generac rallied on repeat announcement of large hyperscaler orders.
Struggled builder of turbines suddenly printing money due to data center power demand; unexpected turnaround story.
